delta.comment: Implemented the Auto-Tune follow-up scope locally and moved the feature/tasks to review. Validation: `$env:PYTHONPATH="src"; D:/Python314/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_verify_workspace.py -q` passed with `19 passed, 6 subtests passed`. Shipment `005-S` remains active for the remaining Ship lifecycle steps.

Corrected git workflow after local implementation: shipment work now lives on branch `feat/auto-tune-follow-up-hardening`. The branch was created after the implementation pass so future review/commit work can proceed off `main`.

Review-ready staged diff prepared for the feature scope. Staged diff summary: 4 files changed, 426 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-). Shipment-relevant files are isolated from unrelated worktree changes for the upcoming review gate.

delta.author: williamsderek
delta.message: feat: Enhance autoharness with new Ship and Stage agents, improving backlog management and execution pipelines

delta.comment: Review gate run against the pushed branch `feat/auto-tune-follow-up-hardening` found a blocking issue, so the feature is moving back to active instead of proceeding to PR. High finding: `src/autoharness/verify_workspace.py` only mines `learning_signals` from the compound library and hard-gates all learning-signal output on `docs/compound`, which conflicts with the updated Auto-Tune / tune-harness contract that treats verifier-mined signals as authoritative for compound, continuous-learning, and closure evidence. Medium findings: repo-level self-install artifacts were bundled with null manifest checksums, making verify-workspace report 16 manifest-tracked artifacts as `user-modified` and 2 as `missing` on this branch; added tests cover wording and a compound happy path but not closure-only or continuous-learning-only signal paths.

Backlog state note: attempted to move `005-F` out of `review` after the blocking review finding, but backlogit rejected both `review -> active` and `review -> blocked` transitions via `validate_status_transition`. The feature therefore remains in `review` even though PR progression should pause until the blocking verifier issue is fixed.

Blocking review follow-up completed on branch `feat/auto-tune-follow-up-hardening` and pushed to origin. Commit `c271531bb89bafab0643a374280f42b9144bda26` hardens `verify_workspace` so learning-signal mining no longer depends on compound entries alone, adds closure-only and continuous-learning-only regression coverage, skips false `user-modified` drift when manifest checksums are blank, normalizes the committed dogfood `.autoharness` metadata, and removes the tracked local `.mcp.json`. Validation: `uv run pytest tests/test_verify_workspace.py` passed (`22 passed`) and `uv run autoharness verify-workspace --workspace . --autoharness-home . --json` returned `0 blockers`, `0 warnings`, and `0 strict_schema_blockers`. The feature remains in `review` and is ready for the PR-preparation step.
